reviews.review_description: As a tech and car fan I think it is cool that you can test drive the Nissan ARIYA in VR but I wish you could drive it yourself and make the touch screen work

Love the idea of using VR to advertise car. Wish the app use actual pictures or present actual pictures.
Missing features: start the app by asking the VR user his height. And then display a fake person of the height of the user next to the car. I also wanted to learn more about the engine and why is this car any better than other car. The engine is after all the heart of the car. I want to know where is the oil filter, the air filter, etc... and what oil does it uses. Since it is VR, you can remove the doors and let us see around the car. You can also remove the entire cover so we can visualize better the interior.
On top of that, I need to know dimension of the car, cargo space, how much space is for the passengers, price, etc...

it is a good start, first time I see such app in the VR store, and hopefully not the last one. This is the future of VR advertisement imho.
